Gold Coast Roof Tiling Specialists

Trusted Since 1992.
Roof Tile Supplies & Services.

Expert leak detection, roof inspections, repairs, restoration, and roof tile supplies across the Gold Coast. Award winning — trusted by homeowners, insurance builders, and real estate agents for over 34 years.

Fully Licensed & Insured
Since 1992 — 34+ Years
🤖 Book: 07 5230 8868AI Bookings Line
Office: 07 5564 5370gcrooftiling@gmail.comOur Services

Recent Projects

What We Do

Comprehensive Roofing & Tiling Services

From a single broken tile to a complete roof restoration, GC Roof Tiling Solutions has the expertise and equipment to handle every job with precision and care.

Roof Inspections

Comprehensive roof inspections with detailed written reports. Ideal for pre-purchase, insurance, or annual maintenance assessments.

Leak Detection

Expert leak diagnosis using proven techniques. We trace water ingress to its source and provide lasting waterproofing solutions.

Roof Repairs

Fast, reliable repairs for broken, cracked, or displaced tiles. We identify the root cause and fix it properly — no band-aid solutions.

Roof Restoration

Full roof restoration including cleaning, re-bedding, re-pointing, and resealing to extend the life of your existing roof by decades.

Roof Extensions

Professional roof extensions and additions to match your existing roof perfectly, using quality materials and expert craftsmanship.

Tile Clip Replacement

Our main specialty — professional replacement of tile fixing clips ensuring roof stability, safety, and compliance with current standards.

Valley Cleaning & Sealing

Professional valley cleaning, debris removal, and seal installation to prevent water pooling, leaks, and long-term structural damage.

Insurance Reports

Detailed insurance claim documentation and reports for damage assessment. Trusted by insurance builders across the Gold Coast.

View All Services

About Us

Over Three Decades of Roofing Excellence

Since 1992, GC Roof Tiling Solutions has been the trusted name for leak detection, roof inspections, and repairs on the Gold Coast. Our services are trusted by insurance builders, real estate agents, and property owners throughout the region.

Based at 4/513 Olsen Ave, Southport, we're a locally owned business that takes genuine pride in every job. When we quote a job, we show up and do it ourselves — with the same care we'd give our own home.

QBCC Licensed roofing contractors
Trusted by insurance builders & real estate agents
Locally owned and operated on the Gold Coast
Detailed written reports for every inspection
Competitive pricing with no hidden fees

What We Do

## Comprehensive Roofing & Tiling Services

From a single broken tile to a complete roof restoration, GC Roof Tiling Solutions has the expertise and equipment to handle every job with precision and care.

### Roof Inspections

Comprehensive roof inspections with detailed written reports. Ideal for pre-purchase, insurance, or annual maintenance assessments.

### Leak Detection

Expert leak diagnosis using proven techniques. We trace water ingress to its source and provide lasting waterproofing solutions.

### Roof Repairs

Fast, reliable repairs for broken, cracked, or displaced tiles. We identify the root cause and fix it properly — no band-aid solutions.

### Roof Restoration

Full roof restoration including cleaning, re-bedding, re-pointing, and resealing to extend the life of your existing roof by decades.

### Roof Extensions

Professional roof extensions and additions to match your existing roof perfectly, using quality materials and expert craftsmanship.

### Tile Clip Replacement

Our main specialty — professional replacement of tile fixing clips ensuring roof stability, safety, and compliance with current standards.

### Valley Cleaning & Sealing

Professional valley cleaning, debris removal, and seal installation to prevent water pooling, leaks, and long-term structural damage.

### Insurance Reports

Detailed insurance claim documentation and reports for damage assessment. Trusted by insurance builders across the Gold Coast.

[View All Services](https://gcrooftiling-hw9svbez.manus.space/services)
